title: Profiles — Profil Pengguna + Halaman Publik
description: Own-profile record + public profile page for belajar-with-rahmanef.com. v1: ensure-on-first-login mutation, settings form (username, displayName, bio, avatarUrl), current-profile query; username globally unique, normalized to lowercase kebab-case; explicit rename collisions reject VALIDATION_FAILED; isPlatformAdmin read-only from this slice (seed/integrator only). v1.1 (STATUS #9): anonymous etalase page /u/[username] via two public* queries (publicGetByUsername + publicListBadges) returning safe projections only (AGENTS.md §6), plus a badge wall from courseCompletions joined to published courses of active tenants. v1.3 (STATUS #24): public certificate page /sertifikat/<completionId> via publicGetCertificate (anonymous §6 etalase; valid only while the course stays published, the tenant active, and the owner profile exists; uniform NOT_FOUND otherwise), completionId added to each badge as the certificate handle, CertificateView share card with copy-link.

generalization.notes: Copy is props-driven (ProfileLabels); defaults are Bahasa Indonesia per AGENTS.md §7.
